AMENDED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT DAN LU dba HAPPY DONUTS RE-NOTICE OF MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Jonathan Herschel Bornstein, Esq. of The Law Offices of Bornstein & Bornstein 409-7611 for pltf & opposing party; Michael Heath, Esq. of Law Offices of Michael Heath 931-4207 for deft & moving party.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as plaintiff had filed an objection to the motion. Court viewed the objection as an opposition. Matter argued and the Court granted the motion. Order signed in open court. In addition, Court denied plaintiff's request for reimbursement of fees in obtaining the default/default judgment/writ. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
